text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my, it's very nearly my turn.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right. I should do one more round of
stretches just to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, nerves wouldn't help even if I had them.
And besides...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We've done everything that should be done, yes?
All that remains is to see things through. ♪
